step.title: Read current feature flags
step.action: Parse all toggleable features and their current values.

step.title: Display current state
step.action: Display current state of all toggleable features in a readable format.
Highlight the feature being targeted for change.

step.title: Validate feature name
step.action: Validate the requested feature name exists in the configuration.
If feature does not exist, report available features and abort.

step.title: Toggle the feature
step.action: Toggle the specified feature (flip boolean) or set to the specific value if provided.
Record the previous value before making the change.

step.title: Validate configuration
step.action: Validate configuration after change to ensure no conflicting settings.
If validation fails, revert the change and report the conflict.

step.title: Log the change
step.action: Log the change with timestamp, feature name, previous value, and new value.
